title: BASE Configuration (declarative form)
description: Optional project extension config (FR-CONFIG-*). This schema covers the DECLARATIVE (.json) form. The .mjs form may additionally carry functions (Ranker/Validator/PolicyEnforcer/AuthProvider adapters) that JSON cannot express; those are validated by shape at load time (`base.config.invalid`), not by this schema.

rankers.description: Extra rankers, applied AFTER the neutral core lexicalRanker. Declarative descriptors only in JSON: keywordIntent or semanticHybrid.

rules.description: For type=keywordIntent: { "<reasonLabel>": { whenIncludes: string[], require: string[], boost: number } }. See ranker.md.

validators.description: Extra validators, applied AFTER coreSchemaValidator. Declarative descriptors only in JSON (e.g. requireFields, forbidSensitivity). See validator.md.

routing.description: Router thresholds. These are inspectable sort rules, not probabilities.

fallback.description: Help target the Router attaches to an honest abstention (out_of_scope, or needs_clarification without a useful question). It NEVER turns an abstention into a routed result. Ids are resolved against the live inventory; a missing target yields no fallback.

policy.description: Project-level routing deny: agent or process ids excluded from routing. A denied agent and all its processes are dropped from the routable corpus, in both strategies.

deny.description: Agent or process ids to exclude from routing.

embedder.description: DEPRECATED (shipped v1.0.0/v1.1.0): the Voie 2 embedder now has a single reference, `routing.embedding_model` (Studio → Routage). Tolerated so an existing config still loads; inert; removed in the next minor version.

policy.description: PolicyEnforcer selection. Declarative form: a named built-in (e.g. "advisory"|"strict") with options. Functions only via .mjs.

auth.description: AuthProvider selection (MCP). Declarative form: "none", "bearer", or {"type":"bearer","env":"ENV_NAME"}. Function adapters only via .mjs.

egress.description: Egress policy of this root (D22): "local-only" means no resource of this root ever leaves toward a remote model provider. Default: "any".

inventory.description: The project's own inventory exclusions. The engine hard-codes no repository layout: this repo excludes its engineering trees (specs/, exemples/, packages/, tests/) and translation mirrors here; a user root excludes nothing unless it says so.

exclude.description: Root-relative path prefixes excluded from inventory/discovery/routing/manifest (e.g. "specs", "docs/en").

framework_dir.description: Path to the BASE framework install (where the engine lives); written by `base init` so the launcher finds tools/base.mjs.

contextPack.description: Context-pack (retrieval) settings. `budget` caps the tokens a preload plan may schedule (default 8000).

$comment: Declarative descriptor vocabulary: rankers `{type:'keywordIntent', rules}` or `{type:'semanticHybrid', aliases}`, validators `{type:'requireFields'|'requireSchemaVersion'|'forbidSensitivity'|'piiScanner'|'routability', ...}`, routing thresholds `{floor_score, top2_margin, max_candidates}`, and policy `'advisory'|'strict'` or `{type:'strict', grants:[]}` are instantiated by tools/core/config.mjs; auth (MCP) `'none'|'bearer'` or `{type:'bearer', env?: string}` is interpreted by mcp/src/auth.ts after config resolution. Function-valued options (e.g. forbidSensitivity.unless) and arbitrary adapters are .mjs-only; unknown descriptors fail loudly with base.config.invalid.
